message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml ttr.uml

skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor Black
  LifeLineBorderColor Black
  LifeLineShadowColor none
  ActorBorderColor Black
  ActorBackgroundColor LightGrey
}

autonumber

participant "Player" as Player
participant "Turn" as Turn
participant "TrainsDeck" as TrainsDeck
participant "RoutesDeck" as RoutesDeck
participant "Track" as Track
participant "Route" as Route

note over Player,Turn: Created with plantuml ttr.uml\nCf. http://plantuml.com/sequence.html

Player -> Turn : Start

group Draw Train Cards, OR
  Turn --x> TrainsDeck : 1 Draw Cards
  TrainsDeck --> Player : 2 Cards Drawn
end

group Draw Route Cards, OR
  Turn --x> RoutesDeck : 1 Draw Cards
  RoutesDeck --> Player : 2 Cards Drawn
end

group Build Track
  Turn --x> Track : 1 Build
  Track --> Player : 2 Add Completed By
  Track -> Route : 3 Completed?
  Route --x> Player : 4 Add Completed By
end

@enduml
```
